message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC

participant "Client" as Client
participant "TEAPServer" as TEAPServer
participant "MASA" as MASA

Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=Identity
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Response/
Type=Identity

note left of Client: (1)
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TEAP Start,
Authority-ID TLV
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ClientHello)
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ServerHello,
Certificate,
ServerKeyExchange,
CertificateRequest,
ServerHelloDone)
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(Certificate
ClientKeyExchange,
CertificateVerify,
ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished)
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished),
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}

note over Client,TEAPServer: At this stage the outer TLS tunnel is established
The following message exchanges are for BRSKI

note left of Client: (2)
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{Request-Action TLV:
Status=Failure,
Action=Process-TLV,
TLV=Request-Voucher,
TLV=Trusted-Server-Root,
TLV=CSR-Attributes,
TLV=PKCS#10}

note left of Client: (3)
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
{Request-Voucher TLV}
TEAPServer -> MASA: RequestVoucher
MASA --> TEAPServer: Voucher

note left of Client: (4)
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{Voucher TLV}
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,{Trusted-Server-Root TLV}

note left of Client: (5)
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{Trusted-Server-Root TLV}
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,{CSR-Attributes TLV}
TEAPServer --> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{CSR-Attributes TLV}

@enduml
